chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – Merits of feeding the food

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/180)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/180)
text: مِنْ مُوجِبَاتِ مَغْفِرَةِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى إِطْعَامُ الطَّعَامِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, and someone else from Musa Bin Bakr,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘From the Obligatory Forgiveness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High is feeding of the food’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Afi ibn al-Hakam and others from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Serving food is one of the reasons for which Allah, the most Blessed, the most High, grants forgiveness.”’
